{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Shadow
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[The Shadow]] is a parasite that has a strange fascination with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
